title: Lead Instructional Designer at Skill India Mission Partners

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Skill India Mission Partners
jsonLd.description:
Join the Skill India Mission Partners family as a Instructional Designer in Chennai. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Skill India Mission Partners:
Skill India Mission Partners is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Support students with special educational needs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Classroom Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chennai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Skill India Mission Partners!
